main.withdrawal_detail.offchain_tx_expir: The off-chain transaction has expired. Clear signatures and sign again, or create a new withdrawal request.

main.withdrawal_detail.delete_order_forb: This withdrawal can no longer be deleted because a transaction was already sent or finalized.

main.withdrawal_detail.no_sign_token: No signing link for this request.
main.withdrawal_detail.sign_missing_sour: This request has no source TRON address.
main.withdrawal_detail.sign_wallet_misma: TronLink is using a different account. This withdrawal must be signed from {{ expected }}. Currently selected: {{ current }}. Switch the account in TronLink to the source address shown above.
main.withdrawal_detail.sign_build_failed: Could not build the TRON transaction (node rejected the contract call). Check that TronLink is on the correct network and try again.
main.withdrawal_detail.sign_multisig_not: The TronLink account is not one of the multisig signers for this withdrawal. Switch to a signer address listed for this request.
main.withdrawal_detail.sign_multisig_no_: Multisig permission id is missing (chain snapshot outdated). Refresh the wallet status in the dashboard or contact support, then open this link again.
main.withdrawal_detail.sign_multisig_mul: Your TronLink / TronWeb does not support multisig signing (trx.multiSign). Update TronLink or try another browser.

main.my_business.title: My Business
main.my_business.subtitle: Manage your payment services and partner network
main.my_business.filter_on_ramp_hint: Show onRamp only; click again to show all directions
main.my_business.filter_off_ramp_hint: Show offRamp only; click again to show all directions
main.my_business.filter_no_services_of_t: No directions of this type. Click the same badge again to clear the filter.
main.my_business.filter_active_banner_on: Showing onRamp directions only. Click the onRamp badge again to show all directions.
main.my_business.filter_active_banner_of: Showing offRamp directions only. Click the offRamp badge again to show all directions.
main.my_business.help_text: Our specialists will help you set up API integration for your onRamp/offRamp solutions within 24 hours.
main.my_business.toggle_status_hint: Click to activate or pause this direction
main.my_business.cash_city_placeholder: Pick from suggestions or type a name, Enter to add
main.my_business.new_service_help_intro: A short overview of how a direction works and what you can configure.
main.my_business.new_service_help_on_off:
onRamp — we accept fiat in exchange for stablecoin;
offRamp — we pay out fiat while taking stablecoin as collateral. The type affects field order and the deal flow.
main.my_business.new_service_help_corpor: You can rely on corporate wallets (external TRON or multisig) that you added under “Corporate wallets” when defining the crypto side and routing.
main.my_business.new_service_help_forms: If a payment method code is set, you can preview the fiat transfer details form; space-level form overrides are configured via the API.
main.my_business.exchange_error: Could not load or save exchange directions. Check permissions and try again.
main.my_business.fiat_limits_usd_hint: Guide: ≈ {{ min }} – {{ max }} (spot rates from the dashboard; approximate).
main.my_business.fiat_required_for_limit: Select a fiat currency above first — then you can set min/max limits in that currency.
main.my_business.fiat_rates_not_found_fo: No spot rate for this currency was found in the dashboard snapshot (check the 3-letter code, e.g. RUB). You can still set min/max in the amount you enter; the USD guide is unavailable.
main.my_business.service_description_pla: Short description for operators and clients
main.my_business.payment_code_placeholde: Enter a 3-letter fiat code above first
main.my_business.payment_code_need_fiat_: Enter the full fiat code (3 Latin letters, e.g. RUB) to search payment methods from the catalog.
main.my_business.ratios_engine_key_place: e.g. forex or rapira pair id
main.my_business.delete_service_confirm_: Delete this onRamp/offRamp direction? This cannot be undone.
main.my_business.form_preview_ux_note: Sample client view (read-only preview; nothing is submitted).
main.my_business.form_edit_intro: Edits are saved for this direction. If the fields match the default template for the selected payment method, no separate copy is stored — the shared template applies.
main.my_business.form_edit_validation: Each field needs an id and a caption (main label or a translation).
main.my_business.ramp_balance_placeholde: On-chain balance is shown in your wallet app
main.my_business.ramp_balance_no_tron: TRON address is not set — balance unavailable
main.my_business.ramp_balances_tron_only: Balances here are for TRON (TRC20). Add a TRON wallet address.
main.my_business.ramp_empty: No Ramp wallets yet. Add a wallet for onRamp/offRamp.
main.my_business.ramp_error_forbidden: Access denied. Only the space owner can manage Ramp wallets.
main.my_business.ramp_address_placeholde: Pick from list or type an address
main.my_business.ramp_name_from_manager: Name comes from the manager profile
main.my_business.ramp_multisig_warning: This address will require setup: set owners and operators.
main.my_business.multisig_wizard_reconfi: You are editing multisig signers and thresholds. Closing without saving restores the previous status (active or error). After saving, the wallet goes through funding and on-chain permission update again.
The multisig configuration matches the blockchain; no further transactions are required.
main.my_business.multisig_owners_all_adm: All admins will be owners of this wallet.
main.my_business.multisig_signers_invali: Only verified managers from the list may be selected
main.my_business.multisig_signers_select: Select at least one address from the available signers.
main.my_business.multisig_signers_no_man: No TRON managers in roles. Add participants as operator or owner.
main.my_business.multisig_signers_too_fe: The signers list must have at least two entries. Add TRON managers to the space with operator or owner role.
main.my_business.multisig_threshold_manu: M is the number of signers from the list only (the multisig wallet address is not counted). N is the signature threshold: how many of the M signatures are required (1 ≤ N ≤ M).
Threshold N must be a whole number from 1 through M.
M must match the number of checked signers in the list.
main.my_business.multisig_funding_min_pe: The exact amount is set after the server checks the network (maintenance). Use «Refresh status» or wait for an automatic update.
main.my_business.multisig_funding_sender: Not enough TRX in TronLink: about {{ needed }} TRX required ({{ amount }} transfer + fee reserve), you have {{ available }} TRX.
main.my_business.multisig_funding_pollin: Funding is required to configure the multisig address
main.my_business.multisig_permission_tro: Permission update must be signed in TronLink with a space owner key (on-chain owner keys no longer match the wallet mnemonic).
Log in with the space owner TRON address to sign this transaction.
Once the balance reaches the minimum TRX, a button will appear to sign the permission update in TronLink.
main.my_business.multisig_wizard_finish_: When the transaction confirms, the wallet becomes active. Use refresh if the status lags.
main.my_business.multisig_wizard_success: The wallet is active. You can close this dialog.
main.my_business.multisig_wizard_step3_r: Balance is sufficient. The permission update will be sent by the server shortly. If nothing changes, use «Refresh status».
main.my_business.multisig_wizard_step3_t: The permission transaction is in the network. Wait for confirmation — status updates automatically or use «Refresh status».
main.my_business.multisig_wizard_step3_f: Setup encountered an error. Details are below — you can retry or edit the configuration.
main.my_business.multisig_include_main_h: The list must include this wallet address.
main.my_business.ramp_field_mnemonic: Mnemonic (optional for External, required for Multisig)
main.my_business.ramp_mnemonic_hint: Stored encrypted on the server. Leave empty for External-only requisites.
main.my_business.ramp_delete_blocked_sta: Cannot delete the wallet: USDT and A7A5 (in USDT equivalent) exceed 5. Please withdraw funds first.
main.my_business.ramp_delete_blocked_trx: Cannot delete the wallet: TRX balance is above 10. Please withdraw TRX.
main.my_business.ramp_delete_blocked_for: Could not fetch Forex rates. Please try again later.
main.my_business.ramp_delete_blocked_dir: Cannot delete the wallet: it is linked to off-ramp directions: {{titles}}. Change the wallet on those directions or remove them first.
main.my_business.space_wallet_empty: Add a corporate wallet in «My business», then select it here.
main.my_business.space_wallet_escrow_hin: Funds will be sent to this address when the escrow deal completes.
main.my_business.onramp_escrow_requisite: Escrow account details will be provided by the system when the deal is made.

Add a short nickname below for a simpler address instead of the long technical one.
main.guarantor.arbiter_nickname_hint: 3–32 characters: lowercase letters, digits, hyphens only; no leading or trailing hyphen. Must be unique on the platform.
main.guarantor.rules_item_1: Keep directions and currencies up to date — they drive deal matching.

main.guarantor.no_directions: No directions yet — add the first one.
main.guarantor.delete_confirm_message: This direction will be removed permanently.
main.guarantor.verification_info_modal_t: Partners may list you as a guarantor, but the platform will not recommend you as a guarantor without verification.
main.guarantor.all_payment_methods_label: All payment methods for this currency
main.guarantor.all_payment_methods_optio: Apply to all payment methods for this currency
main.guarantor.all_methods_geo_rank_hint: Without specializing by payment method, you will appear lower in the guarantor list for Geo by {{currency}}.
main.guarantor.errors.all_methods_blocke: You can't add «all payment methods» while this currency already has specific payment methods. Remove those directions first or delete them for this currency.
main.guarantor.errors.specific_blocked_b: This currency already has «all payment methods». Remove that direction before adding a specific payment method.

main.detail.ai_audit_hint: Run an AI audit to identify potential risks in this deal.

main.how_it_works.title: How TrustLayer Works
main.how_it_works.subtitle: We provide a secure bridge for P2P transactions using multi-sig and AI-powered auditing.
main.how_it_works.step1_desc: Buyer and Seller agree on terms. The Buyer creates the escrow deal.
main.how_it_works.step2_desc: AI analyzes the deal terms to identify potential loopholes or unfair conditions.
main.how_it_works.step3_desc: The Buyer deposits the agreed crypto amount into a secure multi-signature contract.
main.how_it_works.step4_desc: Once the Seller delivers, the Buyer verifies and releases the funds instantly.
main.how_it_works.cta_title: Ready to secure your first trade?
main.how_it_works.cta_subtitle: Join thousands of traders who trust our platform.
main.simple.intro: Simple static UI: deal stages, amounts, and how funds move through the lockbox escrow contract. Live trades run in the main Escrow app.
main.simple.orders_list_hint: Sign in with TronLink to open the order list
main.simple.step1_desc: Rate and terms are fixed at deal creation
main.simple.step2_desc: Crypto is locked in the smart contract until conditions are met
main.simple.step3_desc: Seller confirms delivery of fiat or goods
main.simple.step4_desc: Buyer confirms receipt for the deal
main.simple.step5_desc: Escrow unlocks; funds go to the recipient
main.simple.space_nickname_modal_hint: Up to 100 characters. The name must be unique on the platform—if it is taken, choose another one.
